health-topic.title: Asthma Educational Overview
health-topic.license: Public educational demo content written for this repository.
health-topic.summary: Asthma is a chronic airway condition associated with inflammation and variable airflow limitation.
health-topic.symptoms: Symptoms may include wheezing, cough, shortness of breath, and chest tightness.
health-topic.diagnosis: Diagnosis can involve clinical history, physical exam, spirometry, and trigger assessment.
health-topic.treatment: Treatment decisions depend on severity, control, and patient-specific factors and should be made by qualified healthcare professionals.
health-topic.warning: Severe breathing difficulty, blue lips, confusion, or inability to speak in full sentences can be an emergency.
